login.passwordResetDescription: Use “Forgot password?” to get a reset link, or contact support if you no longer have access to your email.

auth.emailVerification.banner: Check your inbox to verify your email before starting a free trial.
auth.trialBlocked.alreadyUsedBody: It looks like you have already used a free trial. Sign in to your existing account, or choose a plan to continue.
auth.trialBlocked.deviceUsedBody: A free trial has already been used on this device. Sign in to your existing account, or choose a plan.
auth.trialBlocked.emailNotVerifiedBody: Check your inbox for a verification link. Once verified, you can start your free trial.
auth.trialBlocked.genericBody: Something went wrong. If you already have an account, sign in or choose a plan below.
auth.trialBlocked.rateLimitedBody: Please wait a moment before trying again. If you already have an account, sign in instead.
